active_profile_source: active S00 venue/route plus S01 exemplar/template locators

checks: profile is active/current not global default
template stats are measured with sample limits
citation density and section bands are machine-readable

downstream_design_force: S05/S07/S09/S10 receive section depth and language/profile targets
S13/rendered gate receive template parity baselines

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: missing active profile/template statistics for manuscript target
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: template/SOTA profile too vague to guide downstream work
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local trace, label, or wording defect that does not alter authority
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: potential reviewer risk tracked without forced full rerun

anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR and WATCH findings enter local revision or risk ledger; they do not force full downstream rerun by default.
